summary: Joel Spolsky announces an open house event at Fog Creek Software's new office in New York City. After sharing photos of the new office online, many people expressed interest in visiting. The open house is scheduled for January 30th with free food and drinks. The post is a brief logistical announcement with the office address and time constraints.
key_points: Fog Creek's new office photos generated enough public interest that people asked to visit in person
The open house is a one-hour event with a strict cutoff time, reflecting organized event management
Fog Creek's office at 55 Broadway, 25th floor in New York served as a point of pride for the company
money_quotes: After I posted pictures of the new Fog Creek office, a lot of people wrote to ask if they could visit it.
key_insight: A well-designed office can become a recruiting and brand-building asset that draws genuine public interest.
